data.title: Crypto Trader Details 'Plan To Make Millions: 2-3 Top Picks Per Sector Rather Than Dispersing Investments'
data.description: Crypto analyst Miles Deutscher anticipates a major rise in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and select altcoins in the coming months, signaling potential gains for investors.

data.title: While Nvidia Shares Are Hitting All-Time High With Over 230% Return In The Past Year, Some ETFs Linked To Jensen Huang's Chip Giant Have Surged By Almost 500%: Here's More
data.description: Jensen Huang-led chip giant has demonstrated remarkable growth over the past year.

data.title: Now AI Can Operate Computers Like Humans: OpenAI Rival Backed By Google Unveils Claude Upgrades Amid Fears Of Job Displacement

data.title: SoftBank-Backed Arm Threatens To Cancel Qualcomm's Chip Design License Ahead Of Trial In December
data.description: Qualcomm has been threatened by Arm Holdings with cancelation of its chip design license, leaving the San Diego-based semiconductor giant with 60 days notice.

data.title: Tesla CEO Elon Musk Sours On Blade Runner 2049 After EV Giant Gets Sued Over 'False Endorsement' Accusations: 'That Movie Sucked'
data.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk on Tuesday slammed Alcon Entertainment's Blade Runner 2049 movie after the Los Angeles-based production company alleged copyright infringement during Tesla's robotaxi event.
